steps.title: Find the clearest divergence
steps.content: The claim is that France and the United States shifted from agriculture to services at very different rates. The clearest support comes from a comparison where the countries' changes differ sharply.

steps.title: Reject similar-change comparisons
steps.content:
• Choice B: The 1800-to-2012 comparison shows broadly similar long-term changes.
  • Choice C: The 1900-to-2012 comparison also ends with both countries nearly converged.
  • Choice D: The 1800-to-1900 comparison shows similar early movement, not sharply different rates.

steps.title: Use the midcentury gap
steps.content: The 1900-to-1950 comparison shows a much faster US transition: agriculture fell and services rose far more sharply there than in France. The answer is A.
